member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource
member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure Key Vault.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure Key Vault.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource.Secrets
member.summary: The secrets for this Key Vault.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource.VaultUri
member.summary: Gets the "vaultUri" output reference for the Azure Key Vault resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: Gets the "name" output reference for the Azure Key Vault resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource.IsEmulator
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the Azure Key Vault resource is running in the local emulator.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource.UriExpression
member.summary: Gets the endpoint URI expression for the Key Vault resource.
member.remarks: In container mode (emulator), resolves to the container's HTTPS endpoint URL. In Azure mode, resolves to the Azure Key Vault URI. Format: https://{name}.vault.azure.net/.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string template for the manifest for the Azure Key Vault resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource.GetConnectionStringAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the connection string for the Azure Key Vault resource.
member.param: A to observe while waiting for the task to complete.
member.returns: The connection string for the Azure Key Vault resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource.GetSecret(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a secret reference for the specified secret name.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretReference
member.summary: Represents a reference to a secret in an Azure Key Vault resource.
member.param: The name of the secret.
The Azure Key Vault resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretReference.#ctor(System.String,Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource)
member.summary: Represents a reference to a secret in an Azure Key Vault resource.
member.param: The name of the secret.
The Azure Key Vault resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretReference.SecretName
member.summary: Gets the name of the secret.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretReference.Resource
member.summary: Gets the Azure Key Vault resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretReference.SecretOwner
member.summary: Gets or sets the resource that writes this secret to the Key Vault.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Key Vault Secret. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretResource.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource,System.Object)
member.summary: Represents an Azure Key Vault Secret. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretResource.SecretName
member.summary: Gets or sets the secret name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretResource.Parent
member.summary: Gets the parent Azure Key Vault resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretResource.Value
member.summary: Gets the value provider for the secret.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretResource.Aspire#Hosting#Azure#IAzureKeyVaultSecretReference#Resource
member.summary: Gets the Azure Key Vault resource that contains this secret.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretResource.Aspire#Hosting#ApplicationModel#IManifestExpressionProvider#ValueExpression
member.summary: Gets the expression for the secret value in the manifest.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultSecretResource.Aspire#Hosting#ApplicationModel#IValueProvider#GetValueAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the secret value asynchronously.
member.param: The cancellation token.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureKeyVaultResourceExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding the Azure Key Vault resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureKeyVaultResourceExtensions.AddAzureKeyVault(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Key Vault resource to the application model.
member.param: The .
The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

remarks.para: By default references to the Azure Key Vault resource will be assigned the following roles:
These can be replaced by calling .
Use the methods to add secrets to the Key Vault:

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureKeyVaultResourceExtensions.WithRoleAssignments``1(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{``0},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource},Azure.Provisioning.KeyVault.KeyVaultBuiltInRole[])
member.summary: Assigns the specified roles to the given resource, granting it the necessary permissions on the target Azure Key Vault resource. This replaces the default role assignments for the resource.
member.param: The resource to which the specified roles will be assigned.
The target Azure Key Vault resource.
The built-in Key Vault roles to be assigned.
member.returns: The updated with the applied role assignments.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureKeyVaultResourceExtensions.GetSecret(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource},System.String)
member.summary: Gets a secret reference for the specified secret name from the Azure Key Vault resource.
member.param: The Azure Key Vault resource builder.
The name of the secret.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureKeyVaultResourceExtensions.AddSecret(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource},System.String,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ParameterResource})
member.summary: Adds a secret to the Azure Key Vault resource with the value from a parameter resource.
member.param: The Azure Key Vault resource builder.
The name of the secret. Must follow Azure Key Vault naming rules.
The parameter resource containing the secret value.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureKeyVaultResourceExtensions.AddSecret(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource},System.String,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ParameterResource)
member.summary: Adds a secret to the Azure Key Vault resource with the value from a parameter resource.
member.param: The Azure Key Vault resource builder.
The name of the secret. Must follow Azure Key Vault naming rules.
The parameter resource containing the secret value.

member.summary: Adds a secret to the Azure Key Vault resource with the value from a reference expression.
member.param: The Azure Key Vault resource builder.
The name of the secret. Must follow Azure Key Vault naming rules.
The reference expression containing the secret value.

The name of the secret. Must follow Azure Key Vault naming rules.

member.summary: Adds a secret to the Azure Key Vault resource with the value from a parameter resource.
member.param: The Azure Key Vault resource builder.
The name of the secret resource.
The name of the secret. Must follow Azure Key Vault naming rules.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureKeyVaultResourceExtensions.AddSecret(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKeyVaultResource},System.String,System.String,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ReferenceExpression)
member.summary: Adds a secret to the Azure Key Vault resource with the value from a reference expression.
member.param: The Azure Key Vault resource builder.
The name of the secret resource.
The name of the secret. Must follow Azure Key Vault naming rules.
The reference expression containing the secret value.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureKeyVaultResourceExtensions.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [-0-9A-Za-z] atomically at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.AzureKeyVaultSecretNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_20FF03FEFFFF07FEFFFF07
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "-0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".
